items.title: Developing and Deploying a Platform that the Business Understands and Developers Actually Want
items.summaryShort: Developing and Deploying a Platform that the Business Understands and Developers Actually Want. A lot of platform teams face a problem: they build a lot of really cool stuff, and then their developers don't use it.

items.title: Presentation: The Rust High Performance Talk You Did Not Expect
items.summaryShort: Presentation: The Rust High Performance Talk You Did Not Expect. Ruth Linehan explains how migrating high-performance caching services from Kotlin to Rust shattered internal preconceptions around delivery velocity and engineering overhead.

items.title: AI Agents with Cloud Credentials Are Outrunning Billing Guardrails Built for Human-Speed Mistakes
items.summaryShort: AI Agents with Cloud Credentials Are Outrunning Billing Guardrails Built for Human-Speed Mistakes. A three-person agency received a $14,000 AWS bill in one day after attackers extracted static access keys and burned Claude invocations on Be

items.title: Stripe Benchmark Shows AI Agents Build Integrations but Struggle with Validation
items.summaryShort: Stripe Benchmark Shows AI Agents Build Integrations but Struggle with Validation. Stripe introduces a benchmark suite to evaluate whether AI agents can build real-world Stripe integrations across backend, frontend, and browser-based checkou

items.title: Presentation: Postgres for Production Agents: Your Relational Foundation for Enterprise AI
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Postgres for Production Agents: Your Relational Foundation for Enterprise AI. Gwen Shapira shares how teams are scaling AI features using PostgreSQL for mission-critical apps.

items.title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu
items.summaryShort: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu. The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.

items.title: Ultrahuman's former hardware VP raises $5.5M for devices that control AI agents, not just record you
items.summaryShort: Ultrahuman's former hardware VP raises $5.5M for devices that control AI agents, not just record you. Aina is going to pilot a new device in the coming weeks.

items.title: Meta now alerts parents if their teen discussed suicide or self-harm with its AI chatbot
